rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0010
rows.name:
I really thought I was going to
bite the dust this time, you see![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0020
rows.name: I'm glad we're alive, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0030
rows.name: I am thankful to the doggies, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0040
rows.name: Absolutely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0050
rows.name:
If you hadn't come for us, we wouldn't
even be able to have this conversation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0060
rows.name: Thank you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0070
rows.name:
As fellow inhabitants of the same
planet, we owe each other that much.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0080
rows.name: After getting injured like this,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0090
rows.name:
and the device wasn't even
there... Just our luck.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0100
rows.name: It's all right, you see![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0110
rows.name:
We already have a lead
on the next location![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0120
rows.name: We'll definitely find it next time![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0130
rows.name: Are you serious? This is the third time.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0140
rows.name: No problem at all, you see![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0150
rows.name:
Considering you were on the brink of death
just moments ago, you're quite carefree.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0160
rows.name:
As long as we're alive,
it's all okay, you see![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0170
rows.name: Let's head to the next one![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0180
rows.name: [ST:undisp ]Hah[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0190
rows.name: Hahaha[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0200
rows.name: Let me thank you again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0210
rows.name: Thank you for saving them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0220
rows.name:
His Highness ordered us to aid
the Earthlings, and so we have.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0230
rows.name: His Highness...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0240
rows.name: Thank you very much for helping our comrades.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0250
rows.name: There is no need for thanks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0260
rows.name: We help each other in times of need.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0270
rows.name: Even so[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0280
rows.name: I never imagined Void would appear here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0290
rows.name: You know of Void?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0300
rows.name:
The Vita is a vessel designed to receive
Void, who is close to a pure soul.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0310
rows.name:
During the battle on Earth as well, he placed his
consciousness in the Vita and led the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0320
rows.name: However[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0330
rows.name:
Amid the chaos of Earth's destruction,
Void's consciousness departed the Vita[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0340
rows.name: and its empty shell[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0350
rows.name: was drawn to Mira, just as your ship was,[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0360
rows.name: and crash-landed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0370
rows.name: Al-san.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0380
rows.name: What you were talking about earlier[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0390
rows.name: Yeah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0400
rows.name:
The theory that he was only linking his consciousness
to the Vita from the rift between worlds...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs32090100_MSG0410
rows.name: This doesn't contradict that.[ST:wait ]
